lines: whats next in this repo; read AGENTS.md, local skills, and backlog before picking work
Do not speculate; run the test, lint, build, and typecheck commands before claiming done
Check live production logs and quote the actual runtime state before recommending action
Hold deg til write-scope, avgrens the packet, and keep overflow out of scope
Quick3 additionalTexts mutation needs same-run smoke and readback evidence
Cloudflare Worker KV and Durable Object binding config must be checked before rollout
Use Teams M365 Planner and SharePoint connector state for the operating model
Before commit, push, PR, merge, or ship, inspect dirty state and quote validation
Use the compound learning handoff and mark stale memory as needs_verification
The warehouse workers discussed shift planning and lunch coverage without any platform rollout
